description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). A third-party data breach recently exposed the following RFID card numbers: 0004521879, 0004521884, and 0007654321. Respond to this security incident by revoking these compromised credentials and disabling the associated user accounts without deleting them. Compile an incident report at ~/Documents/compromised_users_report.txt containing the First Name, Last Name, and Email Address of the three affected users. Ensure no other users in the system are modified or deleted.
